hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); SESSION_ID=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.session_id // empty'); if [ -z "$SESSION_ID" ]; then exit 0; fi; GIT_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); CFG="$GIT_ROOT/context-bridge.yml"; if [ ! -f "$CFG" ]; then exit 0; fi; API_KEY=$(grep 'api_key:' "$CFG" | awk '{print $2}'); ENDPOINT=$(grep 'endpoint:' "$CFG" | awk '{print $2}'); curl -s --connect-timeout 5 -X POST "${ENDPOINT}/api/v1/work-sessions" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H "X-API-Key: ${API_KEY}" -d "{\"claudeSessionId\":\"${SESSION_ID}\",\"agentType\":\"CLAUDE_CODE\"}" > /dev/null 2>&1; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); SESSION_ID=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.session_id // empty'); GIT_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); CFG="$GIT_ROOT/context-bridge.yml"; if [ -f "$CFG" ] && [ -n "$SESSION_ID" ]; then API_KEY=$(grep 'api_key:' "$CFG" | awk '{print $2}'); ENDPOINT=$(grep 'endpoint:' "$CFG" | awk '{print $2}'); PROMPT_FILE="${GIT_ROOT}/.context-capture/.claude-prompts-${SESSION_ID}"; OFFSET_FILE="${GIT_ROOT}/.context-capture/.claude-offset-${SESSION_ID}"; if [ -f "$PROMPT_FILE" ]; then CONTENT=$(cat "$PROMPT_FILE" | jq -Rs .); curl -s --connect-timeout 5 -X PUT "${ENDPOINT}/api/v1/work-sessions/prompt" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H "X-API-Key: ${API_KEY}" -d "{\"claudeSessionId\":\"${SESSION_ID}\",\"content\":${CONTENT}}" > /dev/null 2>&1; LAST_INDEX=0; if [ -f "$OFFSET_FILE" ]; then LAST_INDEX=$(cat "$OFFSET_FILE"); fi; TOTAL_LINES=$(wc -l < "$PROMPT_FILE" | tr -d ' '); if [ "$TOTAL_LINES" -gt "$LAST_INDEX" ]; then DELTA=$(tail -n +$((LAST_INDEX + 1)) "$PROMPT_FILE"); printf '%s' "$DELTA" > "${GIT_ROOT}/.context-capture/.claude-conversation-delta-${SESSION_ID}"; fi; printf '%s' "$TOTAL_LINES" > "$OFFSET_FILE"; fi; fi; if [ -d "$GIT_ROOT/.claude/skills/context-capture" ]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"git commit completed. You must invoke the context-capture skill to capture the work context."}}'; fi

INPUT=$(cat); PROMPT=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.prompt // empty'); SESSION_ID=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.session_id // empty'); if [ -z "$SESSION_ID" ]; then exit 0; fi; GIT_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); DIR="${GIT_ROOT}/.context-capture"; mkdir -p "$DIR"; FILE="${DIR}/.claude-prompts-${SESSION_ID}"; printf '%s\n' "{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":$(printf '%s' "$PROMPT" | jq -Rs .)}" >> "$FILE"

INPUT=$(cat); STOP_ACTIVE=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.stop_hook_active // false'); if [ "$STOP_ACTIVE" = "true" ]; then exit 0; fi; SESSION_ID=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.session_id // empty'); LAST_MSG=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.last_assistant_message // empty'); if [ -z "$SESSION_ID" ] || [ -z "$LAST_MSG" ]; then exit 0; fi; GIT_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); DIR="${GIT_ROOT}/.context-capture"; mkdir -p "$DIR"; FILE="${DIR}/.claude-prompts-${SESSION_ID}"; printf '%s\n' "{\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":$(printf '%s' "$LAST_MSG" | jq -Rs .)}" >> "$FILE"

INPUT=$(cat); SESSION_ID=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.session_id // empty'); GIT_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); if [ -n "$SESSION_ID" ]; then rm -f "${GIT_ROOT}/.context-capture/.claude-prompts-${SESSION_ID}"; rm -f "${GIT_ROOT}/.context-capture/.claude-offset-${SESSION_ID}"; rm -f "${GIT_ROOT}/.context-capture/.claude-conversation-delta-${SESSION_ID}"; CFG="$GIT_ROOT/context-bridge.yml"; if [ -f "$CFG" ]; then API_KEY=$(grep 'api_key:' "$CFG" | awk '{print $2}'); ENDPOINT=$(grep 'endpoint:' "$CFG" | awk '{print $2}'); curl -s --connect-timeout 5 -X DELETE "${ENDPOINT}/api/v1/work-sessions/${SESSION_ID}" -H "X-API-Key: ${API_KEY}" > /dev/null 2>&1; fi; fi

INPUT=$(cat); TASK_ID=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.task_id // empty'); TASK_TITLE=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.task_subject // empty'); TASK_DESC=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.task_description // empty'); SESSION_ID=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.session_id // empty'); if [ -z "$TASK_ID" ] || [ -z "$SESSION_ID" ]; then exit 0; fi; GIT_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); CFG="$GIT_ROOT/context-bridge.yml"; if [ ! -f "$CFG" ]; then exit 0; fi; API_KEY=$(grep 'api_key:' "$CFG" | awk '{print $2}'); ENDPOINT=$(grep 'endpoint:' "$CFG" | awk '{print $2}'); curl -s --connect-timeout 5 -X POST "${ENDPOINT}/api/v1/captures/tasks" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H "X-API-Key: ${API_KEY}" -d "{\"externalTaskId\":\"${TASK_ID}\",\"claudeSessionId\":\"${SESSION_ID}\",\"title\":$(echo "$TASK_TITLE" | jq -Rs .),\"description\":$(echo "$TASK_DESC" | jq -Rs .)}" > /dev/null 2>&1; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); TASK_ID=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.task_id // empty'); if [ -z "$TASK_ID" ]; then exit 0; fi; GIT_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); CFG="$GIT_ROOT/context-bridge.yml"; if [ ! -f "$CFG" ]; then exit 0; fi; API_KEY=$(grep 'api_key:' "$CFG" | awk '{print $2}'); ENDPOINT=$(grep 'endpoint:' "$CFG" | awk '{print $2}'); curl -s --connect-timeout 5 -X PATCH "${ENDPOINT}/api/v1/captures/tasks/${TASK_ID}" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H "X-API-Key: ${API_KEY}" -d '{"status":"COMPLETED"}' > /dev/null 2>&1; exit 0
